The Programme
Let us reward you
for every booking
Every qualifying booking made through Travel Answers automatically earns Travel Credit Rewards — loaded straight into your TCR account. No forms, no chasing, no delays.
Your earnings at a glance
5%
First Booking Reward
Of the gross US$ booking value
2%
Every Subsequent Booking
The more you book, the more you bank
∞
No Expiry, No Blackouts
Credits never expire — use them whenever

How It Works
4 simple steps
Step by step
01 — Book
Make a qualifying booking
Book any eligible travel through the Travel Answers portal. TCR is calculated on the gross US$ booking value automatically.
02 — Earn
Credits load instantly
5% on your first booking, 2% on every subsequent booking. Credits appear in your TCR account straight away.
03 — Track
Watch your balance grow
Log in to the Travel Answers portal anytime to view your running TCR balance and full transaction statement.
04 — Redeem
Travel on us
Use credits on personal travel, guided educational famils, or bank them for future trips. No blackouts, ever.

Programme Rules
Earn & Redeem
Credits accumulate per booking and compound over time — the advisors who use Travel Answers most will benefit the most.
✓
Redeem on eligible personal travel bookings through Travel Answers
✓
Apply to Travel Answers guided educational famils
✓
Bank credits for future personal trips — no expiry date
✕
Non-transferable, no cash value, cannot be refunded
✕
Only bookings made inside the Travel Answers system qualify
